definition: Held-out = UniProt accession NOT in the 69 gold gate-tuning set AND the gene/accession never named in any pipeline development, tuning, miss-analysis, or channel-design document. This excludes every protein the workflow was optimized against, including the specific proteins each detection channel (fold-motif, paralog) was built to recover.
contrast_with_prior: The prior v13 'out-of-sample' number (0.744) excluded only the 69 structure-gate tuning accessions; it still counted the fold-motif and paralog channels' own design targets (CA8/CA10, NME8/NME9/GOT1L1) as OOS recoveries.

channel_attribution_heldout.note: Fold-motif and paralog channels add 0 on the held-out set: their design targets are (correctly) excluded. Their apparent +0.077 gain in the prior number was rediscovery of their own tuning proteins.
